name: Chocolate Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine sugar and salt.
2. Chop the unsweetened chocolate and add with milk; stir gradually into the dry mixture.
3. Cook over medium heat until the mixture boils and thickens. Cook an additional 2 minutes.
4. Remove from heat. Stir small amounts of hot mixture into yolks; return to the hot mixture; cook for 2 more minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Add butter and vanilla; cool to room temperature. (To prevent a crust from forming, place clear plastic wrap or waxed paper directly on top, touching the surface of the hot pudding and sides of the bowl.)
6. Pour into baked pastry shell.
7. Prepare the meringue: Beat 3 eggs with 1/4 teaspoon cream of tartar and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla until soft peaks form. Gradually add 6 Tablespoons sugar, beating until stiff peaks form and all sugar is dissolved.
8. Spread atop pie, sealing to pastry.
9. Bake in a moderate oven at 350°F for about 12 to 15 minutes, or until meringue is golden.
10. Cool.
